name: Galley Solutions Restaurant Operations API
what_it_does: Galley Solutions REST API for recipe management, production planning, and culinary operations in multi-unit restaurants and food service. Enables AI agents to manage recipe and menu versioning for culinary operations consistency, handle production scaling and batch cooking calculation for kitchen automation, access food cost tracking and ingredient cost management for margin control, retrieve nutritional and allergen analysis for menu compliance automation, manage procurement and purchasing from recipe requirements for ingredient sourcing, handle kitchen production planning and prep list generation for operations automation, access menu engineering and contribution margin analysis for profitability optimization, retrieve food waste tracking and yield management for cost control, manage multi-location recipe standardization for franchise quality control, and integrate Galley with POS systems, ERP, and food distribution platforms.
use_cases: Scaling recipes for production from kitchen operations agents
Tracking food costs from margin management agents
Managing allergen compliance from menu compliance agents
Standardizing recipes across locations from franchise operations agents
not_for: Non-food businesses without recipe or production planning
Single-item food producers without multi-recipe complexity
Retail grocery without restaurant recipe costing focus
best_when: A restaurant group, catering company, or food service operator wants AI agents to automate recipe management, production planning, food cost tracking, and nutritional compliance across multiple locations.
avoid_when: ALLERGEN ACCURACY LIABILITY: Automated allergen and nutritional analysis in Galley must be verified against current ingredient supplier data; automated menu publication with incorrect allergen information creates food allergy incident liability and potential ADA accommodation failure. Recipe version control — automated recipe updates across multi-location franchises must include version control and approval workflows; automated recipe changes pushed to production without review create food quality and consistency risk. FSMA traceability — automated production planning for high-risk foods must maintain FSMA Rule 204 lot-level traceability; production planning automation without ingredient traceability creates FDA compliance gap.

auth.notes: Galley Solutions uses API key and OAuth 2.0. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2015. Private (Bessemer Venture Partners, Altos Ventures, Pear VC). Developer-friendly REST API. 500+ restaurant and food service customers. Production planning and recipe management focus. Competes with Apicbase, MarketMan, and Restaurant365 for culinary operations management.

pricing.paid_tiers: Per-location monthly subscription; recipe and production modules
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Founded 2015. Bessemer/Altos/Pear-backed. 500+ food service customers. Recipe and production planning. Competes with Apicbase and MarketMan for culinary ops.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented in API documentation

known_agent_gotchas: ALLERGEN DATA ACCURACY: Automated allergen and nutritional analysis must be validated against current supplier ingredient specifications; menu publication with incorrect allergen data creates food allergy liability — never automate allergen claims without supplier data verification

Recipe version control — automated recipe updates pushed to multi-location franchises require approval workflows and version pinning; unreviewed recipe changes pushed to production create food quality and consistency risk

FSMA lot traceability — production planning for high-risk foods (leafy greens, fresh produce) must capture FSMA Rule 204 Key Data Elements; automated production without traceability logging creates FDA compliance gap
Ingredient cost volatility — automated food cost calculations based on static ingredient costs become inaccurate as market prices change; implement price update webhooks or scheduled cost refreshes

Scaling calculation edge cases — automated recipe scaling for unusual batch sizes (very large or very small) can produce impractical measurements; implement minimum/maximum scaling bounds and chef review for edge cases
Webhook reliability — verify webhook delivery guarantees and retry behavior for production events before relying on event-driven inventory depletion
agent_readiness.security_notes: Restaurant operations. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Recipe, production, and food cost data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Restaurant operations. SOC2. API key/OAuth2. US. Recipe and production data.
